inputs.name: q
inputs.desc: Query tensor [heads, tokens, head_dim] to be rotated in-place

weights.name: rope_freqs
weights.desc: Gemma4 full-attention proportional RoPE frequency factors; ignored for sliding layers

impl.c_declaration: void rope_forward_q_split_direct_f32(float *q, const float *freq_factors, int use_freq_factors, int num_heads, int num_tokens, int head_dim, int aligned_head_dim, int pos_offset, int rotary_dim, float freq_base);

notes: Gemma4 assistant q-only RoPE. The Q stream later acts as the shared K/V stream.
